---
pagetitle: "Speakers"

listing:
  - id: speakers
    template: speakers.ejs
    contents: speakers.yml
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Speakers
The student project conference will include lectures from guest researchers
:::

::: {#speakers .g-col-12}
:::

<div></div>
:::
